title: You Deleted Everything and AWS Is Still Charging You
summary: AWS Developers tutorial on identifying and preventing unexpected AWS charges after resource deletion. Covers hidden charges from RDS snapshots, EBS volumes, elastic IPs, and NAT gateways, and demonstrates setting up billing alarms using AWS Resource Explorer and billing monitoring tools.
